apiKey.description: OpenAI API key. If omitted, the provider reads OPENAI_API_KEY.

baseURL.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible v1 API.

model.description: Default OpenAI model when the run request omits model.

timeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout for OpenAI Responses API calls.

maxTurns.description: Maximum model/tool loop iterations before the provider fails the run.
